DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT NORA YEGHYAIAN'S MOTION 1) TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND 2) FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS - THE MOTION IS GRANTED AND DENIED AS FOLLOWS: INTERROGATORY 7.1, PLAINTIFF TO REMOVE THE TERM "AMONG OTHER THINGS" AND SET FORTH ALL DAMAGES KNOWN TO DATE; INTERROGATORY 9.1, PLAINTIFF TO REMOVE "BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO" AND SET FORTH ALL DAMAGES KNOWN TO DATE; INTERROGATORY 9.2 DENIED, THE COURT CANNOT QUESTION PLAINTIFF'S STATEMENT THAT IT KNOWS OF NO SUCH DOCUMENTS, BUT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF MAY BE LIMITED TO WHAT IT CAN PRODUCE AT TRIAL IF IT FAILED TO IDENTIFY SUCH DOCUMENTS; INTERROGATORY 12.1 GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION; INTERROGATORY 14.1 DENIED. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-07-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Nairi Patterson, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, (510-305-2177), for Nora Yeghyaian, Defendant and moving party.
John Wiley, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-831-0500), for Gary Pasquinelli Trustee of the Family Trust, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Reporter Cindi Erickson, CSR #10055, (925-957-0496).

Court hears defendant's argument through her counsel on procedural issues. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT NORA YEGHYAIAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare and submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion 1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And 2) For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RICHARD NELSON OF THE LAW OFFICE OF MICHAEL W. SGANGA, TEL. NO. (650) 558-8305 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT NORA YEGHYAIAN'S Motion 1) To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And 2) For Monetary Sanctions - The motion is granted and denied as follows: Interrogatory 7.1, Plaintiff to remove the term "among other things" and set forth all damages known to date; Interrogatory 9.1, Plaintiff to remove "but are not limited to" and set forth all damages known to date; Interrogatory 9.2 denied, the court cannot question Plaintiff's statement that it knows of no such documents, but notes that Plaintiff may be limited to what it can produce at trial if it failed to identify such documents; Interrogatory 12.1 granted, no opposition; Interrogatory 14.1 denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
